title: Handoff
description: An implementer's handoff for one task, carrying PROVABLE TDD evidence (#8). The schema does not merely shape the fields — it ENCODES the proof: the RED step must have failed (exit != 0) for the expected reason, the GREEN step must have passed (exit == 0), and the same commands are independently replayable by the blind verify panel. A handoff that did not actually go RED->GREEN cannot validate.

task.description: Id of the task this handoff completes.

branch.description: The branch the work was committed on (the per-task/worktree branch the team cherry-picks from).

sha.description: Commit SHA of the GREEN state — the exact revision the verifier checks out in a clean worktree.

red.description: The failing-first step. PROOF that the test was written before the implementation and failed for the RIGHT reason.

cmd.description: Exact test command run before implementing — must be identical to green.cmd so the transition is meaningful.

exit.description: Process exit code of the RED run. MUST be non-zero — a red step that exited 0 is not a red step and fails validation.

expected_failure_seen.description: Asserts the failure observed was the EXPECTED one (the new assertion failing), not a compile error / wrong-test / import failure. Must be true.

evidence.description: Verbatim excerpt of the failing output (the assertion message / failing test name) demonstrating expected_failure_seen.

green.description: The passing step after implementation. PROOF the same command now passes.

cmd.description: Exact test command run after implementing — must match red.cmd.

exit.description: Process exit code of the GREEN run. MUST be 0.

evidence.description: Verbatim excerpt of the passing output (e.g. 'ok ... PASS', test count) at sha.

integration.description: Optional broader suite run proving the change integrates without regressing siblings.

cmd.description: Command for the wider integration/regression suite.

exit.description: Process exit code; MUST be 0 when integration is reported.

test_files_added.description: Repo-relative test files created/extended for this task. Non-empty: a TDD handoff must add at least one test file (its existence at sha is verifier-checkable).
